description_cn:
在给定的二维曲线内外保持一组点。

使点与曲线发生碰撞。下图实例中，点与凹槽形状的曲线发生碰撞，但实际碰撞的曲线为隐藏状态，凹槽是将碰撞曲线向内侧偏移球体半径的距离后生成的曲线，这样是为了模拟点对应的球体与凹槽发生碰撞。
description_en:
Keep a set of points outside or inside a given 2d curve。

This causes a point to collide with a curve. In the example below, the point collides with a curve shaped like a groove, but the actual colliding curve is hidden. The groove is a curve generated by shifting the collision curve inward by the radius of the sphere. This is to simulate the collision between the sphere corresponding to the point and the groove.

parameters.name: Pl
parameters.desc_en: Plane in which to consider collisions

parameters.name: In
parameters.desc_cn: 如果为False，则点将保持在曲线之外；如果为True，则点将保持在曲线之内。
parameters.desc_en: If false, points will be kept outside the curve. If true they will be kept inside

author: Kangaroo Team
